CVE-2020-35502.title: A flaw was found in Privoxy in versions before 3.0.29. Memory lea ...
CVE-2020-35502.description: A flaw was found in Privoxy in versions before 3.0.29. Memory leaks when a response is buffered and the buffer limit is reached or Privoxy is running out of memory can lead to a system crash.

CVE-2021-20209.title: A memory leak vulnerability was found in Privoxy before 3.0.29 in ...
CVE-2021-20209.description: A memory leak vulnerability was found in Privoxy before 3.0.29 in the show-status CGI handler when no action files are configured.

CVE-2021-20210.title: A flaw was found in Privoxy in versions before 3.0.29. Memory lea ...
CVE-2021-20210.description: A flaw was found in Privoxy in versions before 3.0.29. Memory leak in the show-status CGI handler when no filter files are configured can lead to a system crash.

CVE-2021-20211.title: A flaw was found in Privoxy in versions before 3.0.29. Memory lea ...
CVE-2021-20211.description: A flaw was found in Privoxy in versions before 3.0.29. Memory leak when client tags are active can cause a system crash.

CVE-2021-20212.title: A flaw was found in Privoxy in versions before 3.0.29. Memory lea ...
CVE-2021-20212.description: A flaw was found in Privoxy in versions before 3.0.29. Memory leak if multiple filters are executed and the last one is skipped due to a pcre error leading to a system crash.

CVE-2021-20213.title: A flaw was found in Privoxy in versions before 3.0.29. Dereferenc ...
CVE-2021-20213.description: A flaw was found in Privoxy in versions before 3.0.29. Dereference of a NULL-pointer that could result in a crash if accept-intercepted-requests was enabled, Privoxy failed to get the request destination from the Host header and a memory allocation failed.

CVE-2021-20214.title: A flaw was found in Privoxy in versions before 3.0.29. Memory lea ...
CVE-2021-20214.description: A flaw was found in Privoxy in versions before 3.0.29. Memory leaks in the client-tags CGI handler when client tags are configured and memory allocations fail can lead to a system crash.

CVE-2021-20215.title: A flaw was found in Privoxy in versions before 3.0.29. Memory lea ...
CVE-2021-20215.description: A flaw was found in Privoxy in versions before 3.0.29. Memory leaks in the show-status CGI handler when memory allocations fail can lead to a system crash.

CVE-2021-20216.title: A flaw was found in Privoxy in versions before 3.0.31. A memory l ...
CVE-2021-20216.description: A flaw was found in Privoxy in versions before 3.0.31. A memory leak that occurs when decompression fails unexpectedly may lead to a denial of service. The highest threat from this vulnerability is to system availability.

CVE-2021-20217.title: A flaw was found in Privoxy in versions before 3.0.31. An asserti ...
CVE-2021-20217.description: A flaw was found in Privoxy in versions before 3.0.31. An assertion failure triggered by a crafted CGI request may lead to denial of service. The highest threat from this vulnerability is to system availability.

CVE-2021-20272.title: A flaw was found in privoxy before 3.0.32. An assertion failure c ...
CVE-2021-20272.description: A flaw was found in privoxy before 3.0.32. An assertion failure could be triggered with a crafted CGI request leading to server crash.

CVE-2021-20273.title: A flaw was found in privoxy before 3.0.32. A crash can occur via  ...
CVE-2021-20273.description: A flaw was found in privoxy before 3.0.32. A crash can occur via a crafted CGI request if Privoxy is toggled off.

CVE-2021-20275.title: A flaw was found in privoxy before 3.0.32. A invalid read of size ...
CVE-2021-20275.description: A flaw was found in privoxy before 3.0.32. A invalid read of size two may occur in chunked_body_is_complete() leading to denial of service.

CVE-2021-20276.title: A flaw was found in privoxy before 3.0.32. Invalid memory access  ...
CVE-2021-20276.description: A flaw was found in privoxy before 3.0.32. Invalid memory access with an invalid pattern passed to pcre_compile() may lead to denial of service.

CVE-2021-44540.title: A vulnerability was found in Privoxy which was fixed in get_url_s ...
CVE-2021-44540.description: A vulnerability was found in Privoxy which was fixed in get_url_spec_param() by freeing memory of compiled pattern spec before bailing.

CVE-2021-44543.title: An XSS vulnerability was found in Privoxy which was fixed in cgi_ ...
CVE-2021-44543.description: An XSS vulnerability was found in Privoxy which was fixed in cgi_error_no_template() by encode the template name when Privoxy is configured to servce the user-manual itself.
